commit.message: Remove lci bindings to github gists

Rest of the fkng game lol

- Music, sound effects
- Score
- Game over and restart when killing all stars
- Fix issue with the last start killed crashing the game... maybe
- Removed prints
Add game over screen, reset & stars moving faster
Add enemy bullets, stars rotating & small fixes

Fix leftmost and rightmost stars finding

When the player kill the leftmost star, the new is the one to the right, same with the rightmost star.
Add player's bullet collision with the blocks

Add player's bullets collision detect with stars

The stars' alive state is store in a separated array of booleans
Add player bullet, improvements in star's code
Add stars and dogescript build script

Initial commit

Basic window with "hello world" in it
